A '''bombard squadron''' was a formation of the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] commanded by an [[Admiral/Legends|admiral]]. A bombard squadron was comprised of two [[torpedo line]]s, a [[skirmish line]], and a [[pursuit line]], for a force of vessels numbering between twenty to twenty-eight. Bombard squadrons were deployed against [[Planet/Legends|planets]] that had successfully rebelled from the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], and had significant ground forces that would take a long time to defeat in conventionial warfare. At least one [[Torpedo Sphere/Legends|Torpedo Sphere]] was usually present in this formation.<ref name="IHB" />
